name: Megalith Notrah Plura
name_jp: メガリス・ノートラ・プルーラ
desc: You can Ritual Summon this card with a "Megalith" card. Must be Ritual Summoned using only Ritual Monsters. You can reveal this card in your hand; this turn, your opponent cannot activate cards or effects in response to the activation of your "Megalith" Ritual Monster effects. When your opponent activates a card or effect (Quick Effect): You can negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that card, then if that negated card or effect targeted a card(s) on the field, you can Tribute 1 monster your opponent controls. You can only use each effect of "Megalith Notrah Plura" once per turn.

You can reveal this card in your hand; this turn, your opponent cannot activate cards or effects in response to the activation of your "Megalith" Ritual Monster effects. You can only use each effect of "Megalith Notrah Plura" once per turn.

action: Reveals itself in the hand for cost
mst: Prevents activation of your opponent's Effect Monsters
